name: Special Use Valuation for Farms and Business Real Estate

eligibility.description: The decedent must be a US citizen/resident; the property must be used for farming or business; and at least 50% of the adjusted gross estate must consist of the business/farm assets.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Values real property based on its actual use (e.g., farming) rather than its highest and best use (e.g., development), reducing the value by up to $750,000 (adjusted for inflation; $1,390,000 in 2025).
